content:
I am happy to share that I have successfully cleared the All India Bar Examination (AIBE-21)

Passing this milestone marks the official transition from a provisional legal professional to an advocate fully enrolled with the Bar Council.

Looking forward to stepping into the courtrooms with greater responsibility, sharp strategy, and an unwavering commitment to justice and client representation.
A big thank you to my mentors, colleagues, and family for their constant support throughout this journey.
